Metadata.title: Dr. Nasim Gholami | Aesthetic Medicine & Skin Health
Metadata.description: Specialised aesthetic and rejuvenation treatments with a natural, scientific and personal approach.

Hero.title: Natural beauty, genuine confidence
Hero.description: By combining science, years of expertise and a true sense of artistry, I help you reveal the finest, most natural version of yourself.

Services.title: The most-loved treatments for beauty, rejuvenation and skin health

rejuvenation.title: Facial rejuvenation
rejuvenation.description: Skin revival through proven science and a long-lasting, balanced approach.

filler.title: Filler & contouring
filler.description: Restore volume and contour naturally with trusted fillers and gentle technique.

botox.title: Forehead & eye-area Botox
botox.description: Soften dynamic lines while keeping every facial expression beautifully natural.

laser.title: Laser hair removal
laser.description: Silky, even skin with the latest generation of safe, low-downtime lasers.

meso.title: Mesotherapy & PRP
meso.description: Deep nourishment and collagen stimulation for visibly brighter, healthier skin.

About.title: Dr. Nasim Gholami
About.description: An aesthetic physician with over six years of experience, deeply convinced that real beauty lives in harmony and proportion. Throughout my career I've focused on results that look natural — yet profoundly elevate your confidence.
features: A truly personal plan for every patient

items.quote: I'd been searching for a doctor whose results would look truly natural. The work was exceptional — my friends noticed something changed but none of them guessed what.
items.name: Maryam K.

items.quote: From the very first consultation I felt in safe hands. Everything was explained clearly and the final result exceeded everything I had hoped for.
items.name: Negin R.

items.quote: The clinic itself is so calming and professional. The quality of the work and the care behind it were absolutely worth trusting.
items.name: Aida H.

Cta.title: Book your specialist appointment today
Cta.description: Reserve your consultation in seconds — by phone or via our online booking form.
